generalization.notes: Renderless `CommandPaletteCore` consumes generic `CommandGroup[]` + label bag. Nosion-specific wiring isolated under `adapters/nosion.tsx` + `adapters/NosionCommandPalette.tsx` (excluded from kitab UP-sync surface). `SearchModal` accepts `labels?: SearchModalLabels` with defaults. Slice index re-exports `CommandPalette` = Nosion adapter for back-compat with the dashboard mount. Wave N+3.7 — kitab adopted the renderless surface as `command-menu@0.2.0`; this consumer remains ahead because it ships the `adapters/` extras (still excluded from UP-sync). Verdict will read `up-needed` again until adapters are either dropped consumer-side or accepted as a separate consumer-locked slice.
